channel.title: admin on Gabriele Bozzola's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Gabriele Bozzola's Homepage

item.description: I am a graduate student at the Department of Astronomy and Steward Observatory at The University of Arizona in Tucson (AZ). I work with Vasilis Paschalidis on various topics in gravitational physics. In particular, I use and extend the Einstein Toolkit to perform dynamical-spacetime simulations of rotating relativistic stars, and of systems with charged black holes. Moreover, I live inside GNU Emacs. If you want to know more about me, you can read my academic curriculum vitae or you can send me an email.
